name: Sweet Red Lentils
recipeIngredient: 1 lb red lentils (dried – canned can be used if dried unavailable)
Fresh coriander leaves or parsley for garnish (chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Using vegetable bouillon is easier than making your own broth.
2. Fry onions and garlic until soft. Add cinnamon, lentils, chili, and ginger; cook for 1 minute.
3. Add stock, hot water, chili powder, and bay leaves to a pot. Bring to a boil.
4. Cook the mixture over medium heat for 10 minutes.
5. Squeeze lemon juice into the pot, then discard the lemon rinds.
6. Continue cooking for another 50 minutes until lentils are tender.
7. Season with salt to taste and garnish with fresh coriander or parsley before serving.
